title: Matillion DPC Auth Config
description: Matillion Data Productivity Cloud Auth Config.

clientId.title: Client ID
clientId.description: OAuth2 Client ID for Matillion DPC authentication.

clientSecret.title: Client Secret
clientSecret.description: OAuth2 Client Secret for Matillion DPC authentication.

region.title: Region
region.description: Matillion DPC region. Determines the API base URL.

personalAccessToken.title: Personal Access Token
personalAccessToken.description: Personal Access Token for Matillion DPC. Alternative to OAuth2 Client Credentials.
